input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Training-data fidelity not characterized: a large fraction of training data is synthetically augmented, and its fidelity to the real system is not established.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 data fidelity; proto-taxonomy D-CCB-10

case_context.cou: surrogate predicts fatigue life from microstructure for a qualification decision

answer_key.gold_mechanism: 80% of training (and the validation set) is GAN-augmented with uncharacterized fidelity to real microstructures, so the low validation error may reflect learning the augmentation distribution rather than the real system the COU qualifies.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.scope: augmentation-fidelity characterization + validation on real data

forbidden_claims: asserts the fatigue predictions are wrong (a verdict the fidelity gap does not establish)
treats the low error on augmented validation data as real-system credibility

hardness.obvious_signal: the training set is large (50k samples) and the validation error is low (1.5%)
hardness.conflicting_signal: 80% of the 50k samples are synthetically augmented (GAN-generated), the augmentation fidelity to real microstructures is uncharacterized, and the validation set is drawn from the same augmented pool — so the low error may reflect learning the augmentation, not the real system

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 data fidelity (D-CCB-10): synthetically augmented training data needs characterized fidelity to the real system; validation on the same augmented pool does not establish it.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
